content.fact_text: CatalogController implementation for the ecommerce backend, providing product lookup and administrative management interfaces with production-grade observability and resilience.

provenance_data.behaviour: Implements CatalogController with cache-aside, circuit breaker integration via Opossum, strict Zod validation, and structured error handling. Manages product discovery and administrative product updates.
provenance_data.utility: Provides a high-performance, resilient catalog controller with cache-aside patterns and circuit breaker protections to ensure system stability under high load.
